Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JOLENE ROCCHIO's Hearing On Verified Petition For Declaratory Relief.

Petitioner's unopposed "verified petition for declaratory relief" re dual Italian citizenship is granted.

Order signed.
